name: @selfos/answering
description: SelfOS shared questionnaire-answering renderer (08-questionnaires §5.3). The ONE implementation of the answer-type controls, branching/required gating, and crisis footer — imported by both the Electron renderer and the apps/relay zero-knowledge answering page so the two hosts never diverge. Self-contained: plain elements + design-token CSS (no app design-system dependency), driven by the pure @selfos/core/questionnaires `answering` helper.
